---
name: False Positive Report
about: Report content that was incorrectly filtered or missed by PG Patrol
title: '[False Positive] '
labels: false-positive
assignees: ''
---

## Type

- [ ] Text was filtered but should not have been (over-filtered)
- [ ] Text was not filtered but should have been (missed)
- [ ] Image was blocked but should not have been (over-blocked)
- [ ] Image was not blocked but should have been (missed)
- [ ] Good Vibes overlay applied incorrectly

## Details

- **URL** (if shareable):
- **Content description**: (describe the content that was incorrectly handled — do not paste anything inappropriate)
- **Sensitivity level**: (Mild / Moderate / Strict)

## Expected Behavior

What PG Patrol should have done.

## Actual Behavior

What PG Patrol actually did.

## Browser

- **Browser**: (e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121)
- **OS**: (e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14)
- **PG Patrol version**: (e.g., 1.0.0)

## Additional Context

Any other context that might help diagnose the issue.
